hero.title: Full Stack Developer
hero.description: I build modern, high-performance web applications from end to end. React and Next.js on the frontend - API Routes, Server Actions, Prisma, and PostgreSQL on the backend.

about.title: About Me
about.subtitle: I'm a passionate Full Stack Developer with a keen eye for design and a strong focus on building smooth end-to-end user experiences.
about.exp_desc: I have almost 2 years of experience in web development, mainly self-taught and through personal projects. I love continuous learning and building useful digital products.
about.edu_desc: High school diploma in electronics. Currently a university student in Computer Engineering.

services.title: My services
services.subtitle: Here are the main web services I can design and build for you.

web_apps.title: Web applications
web_apps.description: I build modern web applications using technologies like React, Next.js, and scalable backend like Prisma and PostgreSQL to create fast and interactive products.

business_sites.title: Business websites
business_sites.description: Modern and responsive websites for companies and personal brands to establish a strong online presence.

blogs.title: Blogs and content platforms
blogs.description: Clean and structured blog websites where creators and businesses can publish and manage content easily.

features.title: Web app features
features.description: Implementation of authentication, dashboards, and database integrations using tools like Prisma and PostgreSQL.

skills.title: Skills & Technologies
skills.subtitle: I build complete web applications - from pixel-perfect UIs to robust backends with databases.

projects.title: Projects
projects.subtitle: Here are some of my recent projects that showcase my skills and creativity.
projects.portfolio_desc: My own portfolio website, designed to showcase my projects, skills, and experience.
projects.little_lemon_desc: An app that helps people book a table at the Little Lemon restaurant.
projects.blog_desc: A modern and minimalist blog designed for effortless publishing and reading, with a smooth and elegant interface.
projects.quiz_desc: A simple quiz app with a clean and intuitive interface for testing your knowledge.
projects.todo_desc: A todo list with a clean interface for managing tasks, powered by a full-stack backend.
projects.converter_desc: A versatile unit converter that allows users to convert units of continuous quantities.

footer.description: A passionate Full Stack Developer building modern and effective digital experiences.

contact.title: Get In Touch
contact.subtitle: Have a project in mind or want to discuss opportunities? I'd love to hear from you!
